Director of QA Engineering

Veridian Labs is seeking an experienced Director of QA Engineering to lead our quality assurance organization
and drive strategic testing initiatives across the platform. This role combines hands-on technical expertise with
organizational leadership, managing a distributed QA team of 12-15 engineers (including 2-3 QA managers)
while setting testing standards, architecture, and culture. You'll report directly to the VP of Engineering and
partner with Product, Infrastructure, and Platform teams to embed quality throughout our development

lifecycle.

About the Company

Veridian Labs is a Series B SaaS company providing enterprise-grade test automation and quality assurance

infrastructure to mid-market and enterprise software teams. Our platform helps engineering organizations
reduce time-to-market, improve release confidence, and eliminate manual testing bottlenecks through AI-

assisted test generation, intelligent flake detection, and distributed testing capabilities.

What You'll Own

1. Lead, mentor, and develop a team of 12-15 QA engineers across multiple geographies, including

managing QA managers and conducting performance reviews and career growth planning

2. Define QA strategy, testing frameworks, and quality metrics aligned with company OKRs; establish
testing architecture standards for test automation across Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, and Python-

based test suites

3. Own the design and implementation of CI/CD test pipeline infrastructure, ensuring fast feedback loops

and reliable automated test execution across staging and production environments

4. Collaborate with Engineering leadership to establish quality gates, SLAs, and KPIs (test coverage,

flakiness rates, MTTR) and drive continuous improvement

5. Drive adoption of best practices in test automation, including API testing via Postman collections, end-

to-end testing frameworks, and performance/load testing strategies

6. Evaluate, adopt, and integrate new QA tools and technologies (e.g., advanced test reporting, AI-driven

flake detection) to improve team efficiency and testing quality

7. Manage cross-functional projects involving QA, DevOps, and Platform teams to improve testing

infrastructure scalability and reduce test execution times

at Veridian Labs — Intelligent test automation that scales with your ambitionSan Francisco, CA (Hybrid) • Full-Time • $280,000 - $420,000 base + equity 8. Conduct technical interviews, hire top QA talent, and build a high-performing culture of quality

ownership across engineering teams

Required

Preferred

Experience with distributed testing platforms
and cloud-based test execution (e.g.,

BrowserStack, Sauce Labs integration)
Familiarity with API testing methodologies and
tools like Postman or REST Assured
Background scaling QA teams from 5 to 15+
engineers or managing multiple QA team leads

Knowledge of flaky test detection, test data
management, or test result analytics

10+ years in QA and software testing with 3+
years in leadership roles managing QA teams

(including managing managers)
Hands-on expertise with modern test
automation frameworks including Playwright,
Selenium, and JavaScript/Python;
demonstrated ability to architect large-scale test

automation solutions
Strong experience designing and implementing
CI/CD test pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions,
GitLab CI, or similar) with proficiency in
infrastructure-as-code approaches
Proven track record of scaling QA operations,

improving testing efficiency, and reducing
time-to-market for mid-market or enterprise
SaaS companies
Excellent communication and stakeholder
management skills; ability to influence
engineering and product leadership on quality
strategy and testing priorities

Technologies

Playwright

  Cypress

  Selenium   Python  

JavaScript

  Postman

CI/CD Pipelines (Jenkins/GitHub Actions/GitLab CI)

  Docker/Kubernetes

  REST APIs

Test Analytics & Reporting Tools

Perks & Benefits

Competitive equity package with 4-year vesting schedule and annual refresh grants
Comprehensive health coverage (medical, dental, vision) with employer coverage of 85%+ premiums
Unlimited PTO policy with explicit encouragement to take 20+ days annually
Professional development budget of $5,000/year for conferences, certifications, and training
Commuter benefits and home office stipend ($2,000/year for remote setup)

Mental health support including 10 free therapy sessions annually via Talkspace
Parental leave of 16 weeks paid for primary caregiver, 12 weeks for secondary caregiver

 Annual company retreat + team-specific offsites for leadership team building

Next Steps

Apply on our careers page at www.veridian-labs.com/careers or submit your resume and cover letter to
careers@veridian-labs.com. Please include examples of QA infrastructure projects you've led and your
approach to building and scaling engineering teams. We review applications on a rolling basis and will reach

out to strong candidates within 5 business days.
